blocking_items: apps/web/src/components/detail-panel.tsx:71-75,228-253 closes the panel with router.push(...) for Escape, backdrop click, and the Close button. As implemented, opening an item and then closing it adds a second history entry, so browser Back reopens the panel instead of returning to the previous page.
